title: Neuroengine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Neuroengines''' were propulsion technology used in [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. They contained a ship's [[dovin basal]]s and resembled hives.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
*[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse'' abridged audiobook]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
